ExplicitItLambdaParameter:AppDetailAdapter.kt$AppDetailAdapter${ it -> val transform = permission.name.substring(it.length) if (transform.matches("[A-Z_]+".toRegex())) { transform.split("_") .joinToString(separator = " ") { it.lowercase(Locale.US) } } else { null } }
